zh.Dunster or Augustinian, Somerset, Englan: 英國英格蘭薩默塞特登斯特
zh.Dunster, Somerset,, England: 英國英格蘭薩默塞特登斯特
zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth De Luttrell於1412年出生在英國英格蘭薩默塞特登斯特時，她的父親Sir John Luttrell18歲，母親Margaret Touchet14歲。她於1427年與William Crouche在英國薩默塞特結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1449年在英國薩默塞特享年37歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth De Luttrell于1412年出生在英国英格兰薩默塞特登斯特时，她的父亲Sir John Luttrell18岁，母亲Margaret Touchet14岁。她于1427年与William Crouche在英国薩默塞特结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1449年在英国薩默塞特享年37岁。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Luttrell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): from a diminutive of Old French loutre ‘otter’ (from Latin lutra), applied as a nickname for someone thought to resemble an otter, or a metonymic occupational name for someone who hunted otters (for their pelts). Compare Luter and Litteral .

variants.name: Luter
meanings: from Old French loutre ‘otter’, either used as a nickname, or alternatively as a metonymic occupational name to denote an otter hunter.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth De Luttrell was born in 1412, in Dunster, Somerset, England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir John Luttrell, was 18 and her mother, Margaret Touchet, was 14. She married William Crouche in 1427, in Somerset, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died in 1449, in Somerset, England, at the age of 37.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth De Luttrell est née en 1412, à Dunster, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir John Luttrell, avait 18 ans et sa mère, Margaret Touchet, avait 14 ans. Elle a épousé William Crouche en 1427, à Somerset, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1449, à Somerset, Angleterre, à l’âge de 37 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth De Luttrell 1412 in Dunster, Somerset, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir John Luttrell 18 und ihre Mutter Margaret Touchet 14. Sie hat 1427 in Somerset, England William Crouche geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1449 im Alter von 37 Jahren in Somerset, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth De Luttrell è nata il nel 1412 nel Dunster, Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Sir John Luttrell, aveva 18 anni e sua madre, Margaret Touchet, aveva 14 anni. Lei sposato William Crouche nel 1427, nel Somerset, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1449, nel Somerset, England, all'età di 37 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth De Luttrellが1412年にイギリスイギリスソメルセトダンスターで生まれた時，父Sir John Luttrellは18歳，母Margaret Touchetは14歳であった。1427年にイギリスソメルセトでWilliam Croucheと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1449年にイギリスソメルセトで37歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth De Luttrell(이)가 1412년 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 던스터에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir John Luttrell(은)는 18세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret Touchet(은)는 14세였다. 그녀는 1427년 영국 서머세트에서 William Crouche(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1449년 영국 서머세트에서 37세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth De Luttrell nasceu em 1412, em Dunster, Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir John Luttrell, tinha 18 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Touchet, tinha 14 anos. Ela casou-se com William Crouche em 1427, em Somerset, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1449, em Somerset, Inglaterra, com 37 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth De Luttrell родилась в 1412 г. в местности дунстир, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir John Luttrell было 18 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Touchet, 14. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Crouche в 1427 г. в местности сомирсет, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1449 г. в местности сомирсет, Англия в возрасте 37 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elizabeth De Luttrell nació en 1412, en Dunster, Somerset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir John Luttrell, tenía 18 años y su mamá, Margaret Touchet, tenía 14 años. Se casó con William Crouche en 1427, en Somerset, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió en 1449, en Somerset, Inglaterra, a la edad de 37 años.
